

# What is AWS Migration Acceleration Program 2.0?
<a name="what-is-service"></a>

 The Migration Acceleration Program (MAP 2.0) is a comprehensive and proven cloud migration program that’s the result of AWS’ experience migrating hundreds of enterprise customers. MAP consists of an agile-based migration methodology, a global network of vetted partners, automation tools, a training path to up-skill staff, professional services, and financial investment to help manage migration double bubble costs.
